title: Shattering Salty Filipino Lamb Kidney Fry
description: A hearty and savory brunch dish featuring lamb kidney, onions, and garlic, all crispy-fried to perfection. This dish is a unique and exciting twist on traditional Filipino cuisine.
instructions: Heat 2 cups of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Slice the lamb kidney into 1-inch pieces and set aside.
Mince the onion and garlic, and grate the ginger.
In a separate pan, saut3 the onion, garlic, and ginger over medium heat until softened.
Add the sliced lamb kidney to the pan and cook until browned on all sides.
Season with salt, black pepper, patis, and chili flakes.
Using a slotted spoon, transfer the lamb kidney mixture to the hot oil in the deep frying pan.
Deep-fry until crispy and golden brown.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and lime wedges if desired.
